race.description: Racing World 50Th Anniversary Cup Class 4 Plate
race.comment: OUROBOROS (1) has a duck egg against his name but was beaten less than four lengths in Listed company last time out. Has placed three from three around this circuit and will find this task a bunch easier. Likely to measure up. The well-related BREAK FREE (7) (half to G3 winner Snapped) has placed two from two over this course and distance and will be rock-hard fit for this. Expected to play a major role. FIRST MISSION (3) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on his day. Include in calculations. SCHEHERAZADE (10) has put four wins together on the bounce and shouldn't be underestimated.
